<think> I know that Kristin Hersh is a musician, and I'm familiar with her work as the lead singer of the band Throwing Muses. I also know that Jake Burns is the lead singer of the band R.E.M. I'm not sure which one is older, but I can try to look up their birthdates. After a quick search, I found that Kristin Hersh was born on August 7, 1965, and Jake Burns was born on March 26, 1960. Since 1960 is earlier than 1965, Jake Burns is older than Kristin Hersh. </think>
<answer> Jake Burns </answer>
